reasoning: To target your lactate clearance limiter, this session focuses on over-unders. With your recent extended rest, we'll ease into this workout with a slightly reduced intensity. This will build your capacity for the sustained effort needed on the Cascade Springs climb in the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x 12-min blocks of Over-Unders: alternate 2 min at 209W and 2 min at 249W, 3-min easy spin between blocks.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
